prompt: Inspect FusionKit's Python runtime boundary and summarize which namespaced RouteKit model IDs and fusion records are needed to reproduce a synthesis run. Do not include implementation code or a patch solution.
expected_evidence: Identifies namespaced model IDs, model-call records, trajectories, and synthesis records.

contamination_notes: Synthetic dirty-dozen task derived from public repository structure; contains no customer data and no answer or patch solution.
